prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: CRYSTAL STRUCTURE OF KEX1(DELTA)P, A PROHORMONE-PROCESSING CARBOXYPEPTIDASE FROM SACCHAROMYCES CEREVISIAE. Entity description: KEX1(DELTA)P. Organism: Saccharomyces cerevisiae. Polymer composition: protein/oligosaccharide. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived low-complexity tendency high; sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency. Coordinates, native contacts, residue-residue distances, and validation annotations are unopened before the prediction hash.

V64 E62 replay metadata context marks: membrane_context_strong transmembrane_context. E62 tests whether strong membrane/topology context outranks incidental ligand/cofactor or oligomer/assembly context. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: RCSB public metadata or strong sequence field indicates membrane/topology context

repair_context_policy.context_derivation: V63 discovery uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only; V61/V62 labels and post-seal holdout classes are not used for prediction context
reasons: RCSB public metadata or strong sequence field indicates membrane/topology context
